data.title: Dutch Bros reintroduces fall flavors: Caramel Pumpkin Brûlée, Cookie Butter Latte, and new Candied Cherry Rebel.
data.description: In TEMPE, Arizona on August 22, 2025, Dutch Bros announces the comeback of the popular Caramel Pumpkin Brûlée and Cookie Butter Latte drinks for fall. They are also introducing a new flavor, the Candied Cherry Rebel, to join the lineup. The fall offerings aim to channel a cozy flannel vibe, bringing seasonal favorites back to the menu.

data.title: WM declares $0.825 quarterly cash dividend per share, payable on Sep 26, 2025, to stockholders of record on Sep 12, 2025.
data.description: Houston-based WM (NYSE: WM) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.825 per share, to be paid on September 26, 2025, to stockholders of record as of September 12, 2025. WM, formerly Waste Management, is a top provider of environmental solutions in North America, with a commitment to prioritizing people and operating with integrity. The company, headquartered in Texas, focuses on sustainability through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Sonic Healthcare USA acquires Cairo Diagnostics to expand hematology oncology testing capabilities.
data.description: In White Plains, New York and Dallas on August 22, 2025, Sonic Healthcare USA, Inc. (SHUSA or Sonic) revealed the acquisition of a major portion of the assets of Cairo Diagnostics, LLC, Cairo Diagnostics NJ, LLC, and Rye Management and Logistics Corp. This strategic move marks a significant development in the healthcare industry, signaling a shift in operational resources and expansion.

data.title: zvoove acquires Spain's market leader in temporary staffing solutions, Nivel IV, on Aug. 22, 2025.
data.description: On August 22, 2025, in Munich and Vigo, Spain, zvoove, a prominent software and AI solution provider for temporary staffing, private security, and cleaning sectors in Europe, revealed the acquisition of Nivel IV. This strategic move solidifies zvoove's position as a top player in the industry and enhances its presence in Spain. Nivel IV, known as the primary software provider in Spain's X sector, brings a wealth of expertise and resources to the table. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for zvoove and underscores its commitment to growth and innovation in the market.

data.title: Lighthouse Pharma gets $49.2M from NIA to study LHP588 for Alzheimer's Disease; Trial to enroll 300 patients.
data.description: A groundbreaking clinical trial is set to enroll 300 patients in a double-blind, placebo-controlled study of a Lysine-Gingipain Inhibitor in San Francisco. Lighthouse Pharmaceuticals, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, is leading the trial. The study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of the inhibitor in treating a specific condition. This marks an important step in the development of precision therapies and could potentially benefit a significant number of patients. The trial is expected to begin on August 22, 2025, with results anticipated to provide valuable insights into the inhibitor's potential impact.

data.title: Kyle Johnson has been appointed to lead the national HVAC sales division at IAC Acoustics, a manufacturer of noise control products.
data.description: In Naperville, Illinois, on August 22, 2025, IAC Acoustics, a division of Catalyst Acoustics Group, which specializes in producing metal noise control products for industries such as industrial, commercial, architectural, and construction, has announced the appointment of a new member.

data.title: Grounded Lithium Corp. (TSXV: GRD) (OTCQB: GRDAF) reports Q2 2025 financial results, with corporate updates and stock options.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on August 22, 2025, Grounded Lithium Corp. (GLC) has released its financial and operational results for the three and six month periods concluding on June 30, 2025. The company is listed on the TSXV as GRD and on the OTCQB as GRDAF. Important figures include undisclosed values for revenue, net income, and production metrics.

data.title: Eloro Resources is raising C$5.0 million through a bought deal LIFE private placement. Restrictions apply for US distribution.
data.description: This news release is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for release, publication, distribution, or dissemination directly or indirectly in the United States in whole or in part.

data.title: Top Win International (Nasdaq: SORA) now AsiaStrategy, accepts Bitcoin for luxury watches. Name change effective at Nasdaq.Character Count: 105
data.description: On August 22, 2025, it was announced that Top Win International Limited, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol SORA, has officially rebranded to AsiaStrategy. This change signifies a pivotal moment in the company's evolution, with a fresh corporate name and a new ticker symbol on Nasdaq. The unveiling of a new company logo is imminent, setting the tone for the future trajectory of AsiaStrategy.
Kazakhstan's oil conveyed through the Druzhba pipeline continues without any restrictions, according to RIA.

data.title: NexLiving reported record Q2 2025 results: NOI increased by 75% to $5.2 million, FFO per share by 26%, with 2,083 suites in June 30 (up 100% from a year ago). Occupancy hit 97% post-quarter end, and same property NOI increased by 3.4%. Stock ticker: TSXV:NXLV. CEO Stavro Stathonikos positive about growth and operational excellence. Reach lasted value for shareholders. No change in net debt to GBV ratio, but 5.6% increase in net asset value. Further details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: NexLiving Communities Inc. reported strong financial and operational results for Q2 2025. The company's suite count increased to 2,083, up 100% from a year ago and 4% from December 31, 2024. Net operating income (NOI) rose by 75% to $5.2 million for the quarter and by 72% for the six-month period ending June 30, 2025. Funds from operations (FFO) per share increased by 26% for the quarter and 15% for the six-month period. Same property NOI increased by 3.4% due to a 3.7% rise in revenue and a 4.2% increase in expenses. The occupancy rate was at 95.9%, with an increase to 97% post-quarter end. Net asset value grew to $143,816,584 with a per-share value of $4.36. NexLiving's President stated that the company is well-positioned for growth and value creation for shareholders with a solid acquisition pipeline and increasing free cash flow.

data.title: CertiK's 2025 RWA Security Report highlights tokenized projects, warns of security challenges in merging TradFi and DeFi.
data.description: In New York on August 22, 2025, CertiK, the leading Web3 security services provider, published its 2025 Skynet Real World Asset (RWA) Security Report. The report offers a structured set of criteria for users to conduct thorough assessments and evaluate risks linked with different RWA protocols. With a rising interest in RWAs, users are increasingly looking to migrate traditional assets onto blockchain platforms to benefit from improved efficiency and accessibility in transfers. Nevertheless, CertiK raises concerns about the security risks stemming from the merging of traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi) in developing RWAs. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Executive and related parties disclosed transactions with Nilfisk shares per EU MAR Article 19: 17 notifications received.
data.description: Per EU Market Abuse Regulation Article 19 no. 596/2014, Nilfisk has disclosed that executives and/or their related parties have conducted transactions involving Nilfisk shares.

data.title: Tom Lee cautions about premature rate cuts as market is too optimistic, fearing inflation. Fed should be data-dependent.
data.description: Tom Lee, a well-known market strategist at Fundstrat Global Advisors, has advised investors to be cautious as he believes the market is currently too optimistic about potential interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. In an interview with Amit Investing, Lee cautioned that premature rate cuts could worsen inflation concerns despite signs of economic slowdown. He emphasized the need for the central bank to find a balance, explaining that while lower rates could help stimulate the economy, they could also fuel inflation if implemented too soon. Lee suggested that the market is overly optimistic at the moment, stating that he thinks it is pricing in too much positivity. He stressed the importance for the Fed to base its decisions on data and not rush into any actions, implying that significant measures should only be taken after careful consideration. Lee's full remarks are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Brushless DC Motor Market expected to reach $20.68 billion by 2030, growing at CAGR of 8.1% from $14.02 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on August 22, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide market for Brushless DC Motors is projected to increase from around USD 14.02 billion in 2025 to USD 20.68 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.1% throughout the forecast period. These motors are valued for their energy efficiency, compact size, and minimal maintenance requirements, driving their popularity in various industries.

data.title: New York Tech CEO Dan Herbatschek offering Fall internships in AI, Digital Marketing, UX, and Cybersecurity. Applications now open for 2025 program.
data.description: Apply now for the Fall 2025 Internship program in New York. College students can gain valuable experience in software development, quantitative analysis, IT, cybersecurity, digital marketing, and product development. Applications are currently open for interested candidates.

data.title: Aker Horizons ASA reduces share capital from NOK 690,348,751 to NOK 6,903,487.51 by lowering nominal value per share to NOK 0.01.
data.description: In Fornebu, Norway, on August 22, 2025, an announcement was made regarding Aker Horizons ASA. During an extraordinary general meeting on June 6, 2025, the Company decided to decrease its share capital significantly from NOK 690,348,751 to NOK 6,903,487.51. This reduction was accomplished by lowering the nominal value attributed to each share from NOK 1 to NOK 0.01. This move signifies a substantial adjustment in the financial structure of the Company.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up before Powell speech; Nvidia halt AI chip production. Market at a key point.
data.description: As the market indexes and top stocks reach a critical point before Fed Chairman Jerome Powell's speech in Jackson Hole on Friday morning, reports indicate that Nvidia has stopped production of its H20 technology. Dow Jones futures are showing an increase in anticipation of Powell's address.

data.title: Timken Company to join 3 investor conferences, led by VP Neil Frohnapple, showcasing engineered bearings in Aug 2025.
data.description: North Canton, Ohio-based Timken Company (NYSE: TKR) has confirmed its presence in three forthcoming investor conferences. Renowned for its expertise in engineered bearings and industrial motion sectors, the global company will be represented by Neil Frohnapple, the vice president of investor relations. This participation reflects Timken's commitment to engage with stakeholders and investors, showcasing its robust presence in the industry. Stay updated on this eventful development from the prominent company.

data.title: Judge asked to approve $13M settlement as final objector exits. BlockFi's downfall linked to Terra's collapse in 2022 winter.
data.description: The collapse of BlockFi was initiated by the failure of Do Kwon's Terra, causing a ripple effect of contagion among various crypto lending platforms during the harsh conditions of the winter of 2022. This led to significant losses in the cryptocurrency market, with BlockFi and other platforms experiencing a downturn in their operations. The negative impact was widespread, affecting numerous investors and stakeholders as the crypto industry faced challenges and instability due to these events.
